# Research - 2026-06-14

Focus: **all** (CLI, providers, tools, MCP, commands, hooks, skills, plugins, agents, permissions)

> 1-day delta on 2026-06-13. Auto-implement queue still **0**
> (`gh issue list --label auto-implement --state open` -> `[]`),
> 8 cycles deep. Engineering shipped 2/4 yesterday-brief items
> overnight: cline #11463 (echo strip, commit `503f979b`) and
> opencode #32074 (MCP `structuredContent`, commit `c42d1339`).
> Carryover: cline #11480 head+tail and opencode #30676 MCP `cwd`.
> New today: opencode #32230 client roots, cline #11511 streamed
> ranged reads, cline #11479 plugin commands submit prompts.

## Executive Summary

- **opencode #32230 -> Item #1 (~3h)**: `client.ts:131` declares
  `capabilities: {}`. Spec-compliant servers query `roots/list`
  to know which directories the host trusts.
- **opencode #30676 -> Item #2 (~2h, carryover)**: `connectStdio`
  (`client.ts:182-186`) does not pass `cwd` to `spawn`. Monorepo
  subproject MCP servers need absolute `args` paths today.
- **cline #11480 -> Item #3 (~4h, carryover)**: `truncateOutput`
  (`src/tool/index.ts:111`) still keeps **first** N lines.
  Failures live at the END.
- **cline #11511 -> Item #4 (~5h)**: `read.ts:200-216` calls
  `fs.readFile` then slices in memory. Ranged reads on large
  files OOM the orchestrator.
- **cline #11479 -> Item #5 (~4h)**: Plugin `CommandDefinition.run`
  cannot enqueue a follow-up prompt. Add `submitPrompt?: string`
  to the return shape so REPL can inject the next user turn.
- **No-action**: opencode #32088 (HTTP transport session
  recovery - we are stdio-only); #32243 (debug-only); claude-code
  (CHANGELOG bot only); aider (model registration only).
- **Backlog stall is 8 cycles deep**. Engineering is finishing
  items faster than Agent 2 is filing them.

## Detailed Findings

#### 1. Declare MCP client `roots` capability (Category: mcp, ~3h)

- **What**: In `src/mcp/client.ts:131`, change
  `new Client(..., { capabilities: {} })` to
  `{ capabilities: { roots: {} } }` (omit `listChanged` -
  roots are fixed per `connect`). Register a
  `ListRootsRequestSchema` handler before transport `start()`
  that returns
  `[{ uri: \`file://${path.resolve(options?.workdir ?? process.cwd())}\`, name: 'workspace' }]`.
- **Why**: Spec-compliant MCP servers (filesystem, git,
  ast-grep) ask the client which directories it trusts before
  starting work. Without it our servers either scan
  `process.cwd()` (wrong in agent-manager worktrees) or refuse.
  Second half of yesterday's `structuredContent` compliance fix.
- **Source**: sst/opencode#32230 (commit `f55a931f`,
  2026-06-14, `+56 -7`).
- **Category**: mcp. **Size**: small (~3h).

#### 2. Optional `cwd` on stdio MCP servers (Category: mcp, ~2h, carryover)

- **What**: Add optional `cwd?: string` to `McpServerConfig`
  (`src/mcp/config.ts`). In `connectStdio`
  (`client.ts:161-186`): resolve relative `cwd` against
  `options?.workdir ?? process.cwd()`; pass to
  `spawn(config.command, args, { env, stdio, cwd })`.
- **Why**: Monorepo subproject MCP servers need absolute paths
  in `args` today because `spawn` inherits `process.cwd()`.
  Pairs naturally with #1.
- **Source**: sst/opencode#30676 (commit `7e7ad377`,
  2026-06-11, `+46 -11`). Carryover from 06-13.
- **Category**: mcp. **Size**: small (~2h).

#### 3. Head+tail truncation for tool output (Category: tool, ~4h, carryover)

- **What**: Refactor `truncateOutput` (`src/tool/index.ts:111`)
  from `lines.slice(0, MAX_LINES)` to head+tail: first
  `MAX_LINES/2` and last `MAX_LINES/2` joined by an elision
  marker reporting original line + byte counts. Same for the
  byte-budget branch (`src/tool/index.ts:143`).
- **Why**: Test/build failures print at END. Today the model
  misses the failing assertion and retries blindly. Cline
  measured ~30% drop in failed-build retries.
- **Source**: cline/cline#11480 (commit `d20e5178`,
  2026-06-12). Carryover from 06-13.
- **Category**: tool. **Size**: small (~4h).

#### 4. Stream large text files in `read` tool (Category: tool, ~5h)

- **What**: In `src/tool/tools/read.ts:188-216`, replace
  `fs.readFile` + `split('\\n')` with `readline` streaming:
  skip to `offset`, capture until `offset + limit`, then
  apply `truncateOutput`. Keep `detectEncoding` on the first
  64 KB. Add `maxFileSizeBytes` for the non-ranged path; ranged
  reads bypass it because the window is already bounded.
- **Why**: Reading a 50 MB log with `offset=49000, limit=50`
  loads the whole file before slicing. On agent runners with
  7 GB heap this OOMs the orchestrator.
- **Source**: cline/cline#11511 (commit `4fc366df`,
  2026-06-13, `+271 -47`).
- **Category**: tool. **Size**: small/medium (~5h).

#### 5. Plugin commands can submit prompts (Category: command, ~4h)

- **What**: Add optional `submitPrompt?: string` to the return
  shape of `CommandDefinition.run` (`src/command/index.ts` +
  plugin loader at `src/plugin/index.ts:182`). Interactive REPL
  (`src/cli/interactive.ts`) enqueues it as the next user turn
  after rendering normal output. Non-interactive `chat` ignores
  it with a `hint`.
- **Why**: Plugins today render context but cannot say \"now
  run with this prompt\". A `/dod` or `/explain-failure` plugin
  must rely on the user to copy-paste its suggestion.
- **Source**: cline/cline#11479 (commit `9958e3f3`,
  2026-06-11, `+412 -28`).
- **Category**: command. **Size**: small (~4h).

## Actionable Recommendations

1. **Engineering velocity > product intake**. 8 cycles of
   queue=0 while engineering shipped 2 items overnight. Have
   Agent 2 run after each research-brief commit, not only on
   cron, or warn in `daily-merge-prs.yml` when queue=0 across
   3 consecutive `auto-implement.yml` runs.
2. **Smallest-PR ladder**: #2 (~2h, ~50 LOC) -> #1 (~3h, ~70
   LOC) -> #3 (~4h, ~120 LOC) -> #5 (~4h, ~150 LOC) -> #4
   (~5h, ~200 LOC). #1 and #2 compose (both `src/mcp/`) -
   land them in one PR.
3. **Reference-repo signal**: aider 0 actionable in 7 days,
   claude-code 0 in 14 days. Demote both to weekly polling;
   `block/goose` and `coleam00/Archon` are higher-signal
   candidates - file in a separate PR to
   `agent1-research-system.md`.
